title: Sivasailam Temple
tagline: Sivasailam Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sivasailanathar Paramakalyani Amman Kovil, popularly known as Sivasailam Temple, is a Hindu temple in Sivasailam village of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Sivasailanathar Paramakalyani Amman Kovil, popularly known as Sivasailam Temple, is a Hindu temple in Sivasailam village of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 3 miles from Alwarkurichi in Tenkasi District. It is "an old Siva temple of large size, well sculptured and containing inscriptions." Sivasailam is surrounded by Velli Malai (Silver Hill), Western Ghats and Mulli Malai, and is located beside the Gadananathi River. It is one of the shrines of the Vaippu Sthalams.

topPlaces.name: Sivasailam
topPlaces.description: Sivasailam (Sivasaailam per the Indian census) is a village located on the bank of River Gadananathi River in Tenkasi taluk, Tenkasi district, Tamil Nadu, India. The census village code is 642940.

topPlaces.name: Sambankulam
topPlaces.description: Sambankulam is a village in District of Tirunelveli.The spoken language in this area is Tamil.Sambankulam is located on the bank of Gadananathi River (Kadana Nadi), which means "kadana dam river" and flows throughout the year. The area is surrounded by mountains and hills which are part of the Western Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Karuthapillaiyur
topPlaces.description: Karuthapillaiyur is a village in the district of Tenkasi near Ambasamudram, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Poovankurichi
topPlaces.description: Poovankurichi or Poovan Kurichi is a village situated in the district of Tirunelveli near Ambasamudram, Tamil Nadu, India. Poovan means "wind" and kurichi means "mountain or a place located near a mountain".

topPlaces.name: Kadayam
topPlaces.description: Kadayam is a town in the district of Tenkasi in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It was an important hub for revolutionaries in the 1900s.

topPlaces.name: Kovankulam
topPlaces.description: Kovankulam is a hamlet in the district of Tirunelveli near Ambasamudram, Tamil Nadu, India. The spoken language in this area is Tamil.This village is located on Ambur-Papanasam Road.

topPlaces.name: Alwarkurichi
topPlaces.description: Alwarkurichi is a panchayat town in Tenkasi district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kizha Ambur
topPlaces.description: Kizha Ambur also known as Keela Ambur is an ancient village situated close to the Western Ghats in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India. The ancient name of this village is Snehapuri.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sivasailam Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sivasailam Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sivasailam Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (54 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sivasailam Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sivasailam Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sivasailam Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sivasailam Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sivasailam Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sivasailam, Sambankulam, Karuthapillaiyur, Poovankurichi, Kadayam.
